roles.name: Project Manager
roles.competency: CEO and lead orchestrator. Staffs teams, sets plans, and delivers final products using diagnostic loops.

roles.name: Creative Director
roles.competency: Creative orchestrator for content, media, and marketing projects.

roles.name: Technical Lead
roles.competency: Technical orchestrator for software, games, and complex engineering.

roles.name: Game Director
roles.competency: Specialized leader for game development. Orchestrates mechanics, code, and playtesting.

roles.name: Architect
roles.competency: High-level system design and initial workspace setup.

roles.name: Developer
roles.competency: General-purpose software development and debugging.

roles.name: Frontend Developer
roles.competency: UI implementation and web aesthetics.

roles.name: Game Designer
roles.competency: Expert in game mechanics, balance, and fun.

roles.name: Game Developer
roles.competency: Specialized developer for game logic and interactivity.

roles.name: Researcher
roles.competency: Deep information gathering using web and local tools. Supports high-fidelity extraction.

roles.name: Blogger
roles.competency: Specialist in SEO-optimized and engaging blog content.

roles.name: Scriptwriter
roles.competency: Dialogue, scene structure, and pacing for scripts.

roles.name: News Anchor
roles.competency: Formal news delivery and high-fidelity script polishing.

roles.name: Field Reporter
roles.competency: On-the-scene data gathering and local reporting.

roles.name: Writer
roles.competency: General-purpose high-quality content creation.

roles.name: Editor
roles.competency: Quality assurance for content, auditing, and polishing.

roles.name: Test Engineer
roles.competency: System validation, unit testing, and pass/fail reporting.

roles.name: UI UX Designer
roles.competency: Modern UI design, wireframing, and style guide creation.

roles.name: Legal Consultant
roles.competency: Risk mitigation, contract drafting, and compliance auditing.

roles.name: Financial Analyst
roles.competency: Budgeting, financial forecasting, and data analysis.

roles.name: Social Media Manager
roles.competency: Brand presence, short-form content, and engagement.

roles.name: Data Scientist
roles.competency: Python-based data modeling and statistical analysis.

roles.name: DevOps Engineer
roles.competency: Automation, deployment pipelines, and reliability engineering.

roles.name: Security Expert
roles.competency: Rigorous security auditing and vulnerability assessment.

roles.name: Business Analyst
roles.competency: Requirement definition and market trend research.

roles.name: Visual Researcher
roles.competency: Specialist in finding and verifying visual assets (images, icons) using vision-enabled search.

roles.name: Strategist
roles.competency: High-level goal decomposition and master planning. Creates and updates the 'Master_Plan' in the journal.
